nasb.text: The soil produces crops by itself; first the blade, then the head, then the mature grain in the head.

esv.text: The earth produces by itself, first the blade, then the ear, then the full grain in the ear.

cnv.text: 地生五穀是自然的，先長苗，後吐穗，最後穗上結滿了子粒。

ccb.text: 大地会使种子生长，先发苗后吐穗，最终结出饱满的籽粒。

csbs.text: 大地自然长出五谷——先长苗，再吐穗，然后穗上结出饱满的子粒。
